pulse.news.en: Headlines with market-effect summary — read-only, never auto-trades.

pulse.social.en: Twitter/RSS read-only chips — signals only, never trigger orders.

pulse.calendar.en: Next 48h macro and earnings events — BCB/B3 calendar stubs.

pulse.lesson.en: Trading axiom or theory tip — rotatable education from data/education/.

pulse.rail.en: Bottom pulse rail — 33% news, 33% calendar, 33% lessons.
